title: periploca vomitoria
intro: Periploca vomitoria, also known as Periploca, is a perennial evergreen climber native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihypertensive effects. The health benefits of Periploca vomitoria include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of various cardiovascular and respiratory issues. Periploca vomitoria is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of capsules or dried extracts for its medicinal and therapeutic applications.
